question: Write a C++ function `bool areMatricesEqual(int mat1[ROWS][COLS], int mat2[ROWS][COLS], int rows, int cols)` that checks if two 2D integer matrices are identical. Demonstrate with example matrices in `main`.

test_cases.expected: Not Equal (Error: Matrix dimensions cannot be negative)
Not Equal (Error: Comparison dimensions exceed declared matrix capacity)
Not Equal (Error: Comparison dimensions exceed declared matrix capacity)
